title: helichrysum patulum
intro: Helichrysum patulum, also known as the Everlasting plant, is a perennial herb native to Australia and is a member of the sunflower family. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Helichrysum patulum include reducing inflammation, soothing muscle and joint pain, and supporting the immune system, as well as its potential to aid in wound healing and reduce scarring. Helichrysum patulum can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, essential oils, and salves, which can be used topically or taken internally under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
